$schema_note: Maps release artifacts to their Nexus Mods targets. To publish an artifact, create a GitHub Release tagged '<artifact>-v<version>' (e.g. slm-v1.6.0, konpeki-v1.1.0kp). The release.yml workflow parses the tag, stages contentDir into installDir, zips it as '<fileBaseName>_v<version>.zip' (so 'bin/...' sits at the zip root), attaches the zip to the release, and uploads to Nexus via Nexus-Mods/upload-action. See RELEASING.md.
$paths_note: contentDir = repo folder whose CONTENTS ship. installDir = path inside the zip those contents are placed at (the in-game install path under the Cyberpunk root). fileBaseName = the download filename stem (version is appended).
$file_group_id_note: file_group_id is per-FILE, not per-mod-page (and NOT secret). Each uploaded file/slot has its own id - find it on the Files tab > 'API Info' (or the Manage Files edit menu). So the three optional presets on mod 26454 each have a distinct group id from the main file; JNVE's id is on its own page (26743).
